message:
Add unit tests for Agent Activity Timeline (bd-3vtci)

Added tests for timeline tracking and panel scroll functionality:
- TestRecordEvent_RepeatedStates: Verifies repeated state events stored individually
- TestRecordEvent_StateTransitionDetails: Tests details and trigger recording
- TestGetEventsInTimeRange: Tests time range filtering edge cases
- TestConcurrentCallbackSafety: Verifies callbacks work without deadlock
- TestTimelinePanel_Scroll: Tests scroll left/right and jump-to-now

Note: Bead remains in_progress due to blocking dependencies (bd-352u, bd-ptu2, bd-1h9p)
for persistence, marker, and export tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
